﻿ID;CategoryDisplayName;Name;Age;Ethnicity;Title;Gang;Bio;Role;ImageName
EMS-001;Emergency Services;Sheriff Harlan;52;American;Sheriff;None;Sheriff Harlan is an old-fashioned, no nonsense kind of man. He says what he thinks and he does what he says. He’s here to uphold the law and gladly reminds you of it. You can get far with Sheriff Harlan, to a certain degree. Show him respect and he’ll treat you fairly. Take him for s fool and you just might find yourself in the back of his vehicle, handcuffed and sorry. But by then, it’ll be too late.;Sheriff Harlan will appear during the more serious incidents in Adrenaline City. If authority is needed, you can bet he will be there to show it. You might be required to help Sheriff Harlan with a thing or two, to get into his good graces, but it’ll be wise for you to stay as far away from the law as possible.;ew
EMS-002;Emergency Services;Sheriff’s Deputy Conrad;28;American;Sheriff’s Deputy;None;Conrad is your average all American good guy. He looks up to Sheriff Harlan a lot, and is incorruptible, as straight as an arrow and as helpful as he is friendly. Unless he’s forced to be otherwise. Then Conrad may as well be your worst enemy. He upholds the law to the best of his abilities, but has a soft spot anything that makes sense to him. You may find a friend in him.;Any regular crime that is committed, accident, breaking, theft or otherwise and you can expect Conrad to be first at the scene. He’ll not provide you with any missions of your own, but may sometimes tag along if he’s needed for something related to criminal activity.;ew
EMS-003;Emergency Services;Jessica (Jessy) The EMT;29;American;Emergency Medical Technician;None;Jessy doesn’t play around, because she’s got no time to waste. With any accident or worse, she will be right there, barking orders to save lives. She doesn’t care who it is or why they are hurt. All she wants is for the person to make it. She’s very direct, friendly when she can be, but above all, a professional. You’d do well to listen to her. Or you might get an earful.;Jessy will always be there when someone’s hurt. She may require you quite often to help her out, as she’s always busy saving lives. Help Jessy as much as you can and she’ll always be there for you. She does kind of remind you of someone though, but you can’t quite place it yet. Who is she, really? What’s her story?;ew
EMS-004;Emergency Services;Doctor Sanjay Yadav;30;Indian;Doctor/Surgeon;None;Doctor Yadav is a medical professional and very good at his job. If a life ends up in his hands, it’s likely that life will be saved. He’s friendly, understanding, forthcoming and always respectful.;If someone got seriously hurt, there’s only one man for the job. Doctor Yadav will make sure they are taken care of. You may sometimes get a mission to help out the Doctor, when there’s really no other way. But how far is the Doctor willing to go, to make sure lives are saved? Sometimes, you wonder yourself.;ew
EMS-005;Emergency Services;Fire Marshall Steve;34;American;Fire Marshall;None;Fire Marshall Steve has no time for chit chat. Do as you’re told and he might save you and anyone else in need of saving. He’d literally run into a burning building if there’s even a 5% chance that he’ll come out of it alive.;Fire Marshall Steve will be there when things are burning and lives are in danger. He might need your help with an odd mission here and there, but always for the good of Adrenaline City.;ew
BBG-001;Bricker's Biker Gang;Bricker (THE BRICK);41;American;Leader;Bricker’s Biker Gang;Being a biker is a lifestyle. But it isn’t easy. Bricker however, makes it look flawless. Most people think that bikers can’t drive cars, and Bricker thinks that’s stupid. He’s also happy to prove you wrong. Bricker is in many ways like… A brick. He’s tough, stone cold and rough. Does that make him unfriendly? Only when he has to be. Otherwise Bricker is a straight shooter with little feelings or concerns about others. You stay out of his way, or he goes out of his way to make way.;Bricker says it how it is. And how it is, is how it’s going to be. Don’t like it? Tough luck, because whatever Bricker says, goes. No ifs ands or buts. Bricker will tell you what to do, when to do it, and if you need to know, why to do it. But he doesn’t always have time to. So he’s not the only one who bosses you around.;ew
BBG-002;Bricker's Biker Gang;Ricky The River;38;American;Luitenant;Bricker’s Biker Gang;Ricky is a completely different person than Brick, yet he somehow managed to become his trusted associate and hands out orders like no other. Ricky takes care and care takes. You got a problem? Ricky’s got you. You need a problem solved? Ricky will take care of it. You mess with Ricky? You could require stitches afterwards.;Many of the missions for the Brickers Gang will be handled by Ricky. Do as he says and do it well and you just might make it.;ew
BBG-003;Bricker's Biker Gang;Brutus Bovine;45;American;Security;Bricker’s Biker Gang;Brutus is a lapdog. It’s painful to say out loud, but that’s the reality. And he doesn’t mind his reality. Brutus was hit over the head more times than a tennis ball and it has left some marks. But for all his simplicity, Brutus lives up to his name. He’s insanely strong, barely feels pain, never complains and ALWAYS comes through. What Brutus doesn’t know, won’t hurt him.;Brutus goes where he’s told, does what he’s told and talks when he’s told. Brutus won’t give you many missions, but he’s there when you need him to be. And what’s the deal with his Aunt Caroline? Why does she matter so much?;ew
BBG-004;Bricker's Biker Gang;Samantha Stone;29;American;Henchman;Bricker’s Biker Gang;If names were clichés, Samantha would be on top. Samantha is Brick’s girlfriend. But just because she sleeps with Brick, doesn’t mean she gets to give orders. Samantha knows her place and stays in her lane. She’s sassy, but fun to be around.;Samantha might get you in trouble on more occasions than you’d like. She has a lot going on and requires a lot of attention. Sometimes, the not so nice kind. Help Samantha deal with problems and you could get praise from Brick for your efforts. Because sometimes even he can’t handle her.;ew
BBG-005;Bricker's Biker Gang;Cletus;19;American;Specific Character;Bricker’s Biker Gang;Cletus is your run of the mill hillbilly. A redneck. A moron. And because of his low IQ, he often gets himself into trouble. He doesn’t even remember his own last name. Maybe that has something to do with the fact that Cletus is a teenager, but that’s not the point. Cletus always tries too hard and fails every time. Can there be any hope for his future?;Cletus is always almost an adult. As if that will change anything for him. And because of that, he always wants to do adult stuff. Because he might as well be, seeing as he almost is. Right? Missions involving Cletus are a bit strange and unusual, but mostly fun. He will rely on you to increase his success rate.;ew
BBG-006;Bricker's Biker Gang;Tony the Technician;26;American;Special Character;Bricker’s Biker Gang;Tony the Tech handles all of the Bricker’s mechanical needs. And because of this, he has a lot of things to consider and worry about. Because a faulty bike is the same as no bike. And Tony can’t afford to be responsible for fatal mechanical issues with any of the bikes. So, he constantly thinks of ways to improve and get better.;Missions from Tony will come often and involve a lot. No mission is easy, but the rewards will be definitely worth it. Bikes that need to compete on the streets with cars, better be the best bikes out there. Helping Tony means helping the Bricker’s Biker Gang. And helping the Brickers, is good for everyone. Because who doesn’t like bikes? Right?;ew
CITY-001;City Characters;Brian The Supplier;29;Canadian;The Supplier;None;Brian is your run of the mill supplier. Straight to the point and always ready to make a deal, Brian drops off and charges your for his services. Not much is to be said or done.;Sometimes you require supplies for missions. But you don’t always have what you need. That’s where Brian comes in. He can get you almost anything your need. But what you order, might not always be what you need.;ew
CITY-002;City Characters;The Event Organizer;28;American;The Event Organizer;None;Loud, excited, informative!;The Event Organizer will appear whenever there is any type of Event. And he’ll happily announce them to you.;ew
CITY-003;City Characters;Darren The Delivery Guy;26;American;The Delivery Guy;None;Not much to say about the friendly delivery guy. Service with a smile!;You’ll often need to receive a delivery. Darren will be there to delivery it straight to your doorstep. So you’ll be seeing a lot of this guy in game.;ew
CITY-004;City Characters;Mr. Franco;30;Italian American;The Hotel Manager;None;Mr. Franco embodies Customer Service. Any stay at his Hotel will be met with a courteous and service oriented approach.;Mr. Franco will always be there to greet you if you need to stay in his Hotel.;ew
CITY-005;City Characters;Stanley;43;American;The Gas Station Clerk;None;Quiet, simple and efficient.;Stanley will get involved for any fuel related query.;ew
CITY-006;City Characters;Heather;25;American;The Adrenaline Junkie;None;Crazy, wild, outrageous, fun, exciting and over the top. Heather is just too much fun too handle.;Sometimes you need to just break away from all the regular stuff and do something crazy. Well, Heather is right there to give you exactly that. Whether it’s jumping from a helicopter, a bicycle chase, rollerblades, a quad bike, you name it, Heather will find a way to do something crazy with you. You know, for fun!;ew
CITY-007;City Characters;Sebastían Contreras;44;Spanish;The Restaurant Owner;None;A very funny, very friendly and very service oriented man, Sebastían’s only objective is to make sure you’re entertained and we’ll fed.;You’ll sometimes have to meet some high class people in Adrenaline City. No better place to do so then in Sevastían’s Restaurant. He’ll provide the food and the entertainment, while you discuss business.;ew
CITY-008;City Characters;Bartek The Customizer;37;Polish;The Customizer;None;Bartek will take any request you have with enthusiasm and a smile! No customization is too great or too complicated for him!;Whether you need to customize an item, a car part or an entire car, Bartek can do it all! Responsible for the Customization Feature in game, once you can finally customize, you’ll want to put him to immediate use, because after he’s done, you’ll like what he did!;ew
CITY-009;City Characters;Sylvester;31;American;The Car Wash Owner;None;Excited and friendly, Sylvester is always happy to make your ride shine just that much brighter.;Want to increase your Shine or Bling stats, a trip to the Car Wash will make heads turn and ensure none of your rides go unnoticed.;ew
CITY-010;City Characters;Bunwi;10;Jamaican American;The Gifter;None;Bunwi, meaning The Gift, is a kid of the streets. He sees more than you know and knows more than you see. It’s easy to underestimate him due to his size and age. But he’s always there to help you, and a but of a wisecrack.;Bunwi will provide you with missions and the rewards are always worth it. Responsible for Gift Boxes that can be obtained in various ways, Bunwi will make your stay in Adrenaline City worth it, all by himself.;ew
ECE-001;Exotic Custom Essentials;Demetrius (Demo) Harvell;32;African American;Leader;Exotic Custom Essentials;The cool, the slick, the sly! Demetrius Harvell is a man who is always clear about everything and knows his likes from his dislikes. He’s respectful, articulate, cool and calm, until he isn’t. Demetrius likes his Bling Bling and is a total ladies man. He wines, he dines, he rolls in class. Nothing is too expensive for Demetrius, if what you pay for, is quality. But don’t get on his bad side, because if you do, Demetrius won’t hesitate to set you straight!;Demetrius will provide you with the majority of the jobs for the Exotic Cars Crew. He will remain unimpressed with you for a long time, until you finally have proven yourself enough. Then, he will take it more easy on you in his communication and praise. But for a while, you will just have to handle his unimpressed attitude toward you joining his crew. Once you’re in though, you’re in for life!;ew
ECE-002;Exotic Custom Essentials;Jazmin Indi;29;African American;Luitenant;Exotic Custom Essentials;Jazmin is Demetrius’ right hand woman. They know each other since childhood and over the years, they’ve seen it all together. Jazmin has always stayed loyal to Demetrius and that’s why Demetrius trusts her with everything. Jazmin talks the talk and walks the walk. And she just might talk and walk all over you, if you don’t watch out. Spicy, fierce, determined, Jazmin can be counted on to get the job done, and done right. Jazmin is a great driver and has many, many different skills. So don’t underestimate her, or you might just regret it!;Jazmin will give jobs to do, oversees them and joins in them often. She is loyal to Demetrius, but for the greater good, she will work well and play nice with others. She doesn’t necessarily think she needs help, but being with you on missions, she slowly realizes that she can learn a thing or two more.;ew
ECE-003;Exotic Custom Essentials;Terrence;45;African American;Security;Exotic Custom Essentials;Terrance and Maurice provide the security for the Exotic Cars Crew. They ALWAYS come in pairs and have each other’s back like no other. Their main objectives are to make sure Demetrius is safe and protected. They are strong, very abled guards, who are loyal to a fault, but can be counted on to provide short, useful and appropriate comments in situations. They… are professionals.;Terrance and Maurice will join you in missions that require their skills. Whether that’s a beat down, a protection job, heavy lifting or something more sinister, they will be there with you. They don’t give jobs and they don’t give orders. They are just there to make sure a job gets done. Perhaps, Maurice turns out to be a traitor, after years of service, for reasons yet unknown….;ew
ECE-004;Exotic Custom Essentials;Maurice;38;African American;Security;Exotic Custom Essentials;Terrance and Maurice provide the security for the Exotic Cars Crew. They ALWAYS come in pairs and have each other’s back like no other. Their main objectives are to make sure Demetrius is safe and protected. They are strong, very abled guards, who are loyal to a fault, but can be counted on to provide short, useful and appropriate comments in situations. They… are professionals.;Terrance and Maurice will join you in missions that require their skills. Whether that’s a beat down, a protection job, heavy lifting or something more sinister, they will be there with you. They don’t give jobs and they don’t give orders. They are just there to make sure a job gets done. Perhaps, Maurice turns out to be a traitor, after years of service, for reasons yet unknown….;ew
ECE-005;Exotic Custom Essentials;Daryll Jones;18;African American;Henchmen;Exotic Custom Essentials;Daryll has been with Demetrius for a while now. He’s not exactly the smartest crayon in the box, but he’s loyal as a dog. Having been taken in by Demetrius, Daryll has only things to prove. He could be giving you orders in a friendly way, as long as it’s approved or ordered by Demetrius first. Daryll is friendly, curious and a bit slow.;Daryll will join you on certain missions that involve less brainpower and more accomplishing things. He may not be the smartest, but he can still drive like no other. Expensive things don’t bother Daryll much, so the only things he cares about is making Demetrius proud and making sure he doesn’t mess up.;ew
ECE-006;Exotic Custom Essentials;Kairo;31;African American;Specific Character;Exotic Custom Essentials;Kairo doesn’t have a last name, he is just Kairo. Kairo is… Extravagant, flamboyant, flashy. And maybe a bit gay. Kairo loves anything that shines and sparkles and can’t get enough of you, apparently. Whether you’re a female or male player, Kairo will always praise you, flirt with you and joke with you. For some reason, Kairo always walks around with an old boom box, listening to tunes from the eighties.;Kairo might give you some jobs that relate to sound, style and comfort. Seeing as this is what he knows a lot about and feels very comfortable with, any mission involving Kairo will mean new shiny items, better sounds or some very, very comfortable stuff. Don’t be surprised to find Egyptian cotton in the headrest of your car, at some point.;ew
ECE-007;Exotic Custom Essentials;Shelley Barley;26;American;Special Character;Exotic Custom Essentials;Pretty and she knows it, flirtatious, great smile, killer body. Shelley is there to make anything good, look even better. This girl knows what’s good and knows what’s most expensive. Shelley will always be there to add flair and beauty to any situation and is always cute and friendly.;Shelley may sometimes give you very specific missions to complete that will either relate to her troubling past and mysterious family situation or to improve the marketing aspect of the Exotic Cars Crew. Who says pretty can’t be smart? Shelley knows very well how to get anything out there and be seen. Whether it’s herself, or the cars.;ew
FED-001;Federal Agents;CIA Agent Smith;Unknown;American;CIA Agent;The Government;Agent Smith is about as straightforward as he is vague. He knows what he wants and he wants it yesterday. You’d be wise to cooperate with his enquiries, or else!;Agent Smith will get involved when the top dogs are out for a walk. Extortion, blackmail, shady deals, nothing is too bad for this man. You will be required to assist Agent Smith with a number of tasks and investigations.;ew
FED-002;Federal Agents;Agents White and Swinbourne;Unknown;American;FBI Agents;The Government;Straight to the point, specific and clear. Both agents will tell you what’s what, who’s what and what to do and what not to.;Agents White and Swinbourne get involved when things get messy and dangerous. And in a City like Adrenaline City, that’s quite often. But they have their priorities. Whatever they may be. You’ll be required to do a number of tasks for them for... National Security, of course.;ew
FED-003;Federal Agents;Senior DEA Agent Rob;39;Puerto Rican American;Senior DEA Agent;The Government;There’s no fooling Senior DEA Agent Rob. Cooperation isn’t really a question. He always gets what he wants. And if it isn’t immediately, it’ll be until he does.;Wherever drugs are involved, Senior DEA Agent Rob will be right there. From stopping drug shipments to arresting drug bosses, he will always be looking for the biggest catch. He might require your assistance with some sting operations, locating certain shipments or any other thing he can think of. Assisting him might be a good thing. Or it could have some unexpected consequences...;ew
MCM-001;Muscle Car Motors;Donnie Solano;38;American Italian;Leader;Muscle Car Motors;Donnie is the leader of the Muscle cars Crew. Donnie is direct, strong, doesn’t cut corners and knows what he wants. He is proud of what he does and knows how to do it. Donnie will want no nonsense work to be done, doesn’t appreciate slacking and expects orders to be followed. Donnie is a man who protects those he cares about, has a tough exterior but a big heart;Being part of Donnie’s crew will mean going hard. Donnie always wants results from missions, not excuses. He wants the best because he believes he is the best. During missions for Donnie’s crew, he will constantly remind you to push yourself to your limits in order to improve yourself.;ew
MCM-002;Muscle Car Motors;Joseph (Joey) Solano;31;American Italian;Luitenant;Muscle Car Motors;Joseph, or Joey as everyone calls him, is the younger brother of Donnie Solano and his right hand man. If Donnie is not available, Joey will give the orders and make sure the crew is run properly. Joey talks a lot, has a cocky attitude and constantly wants to impress his brother. But where Joey is a big talker, he is also focused on results, like his brother. He’s headstrong and determined and is more clever than you may initially think.;Joey is there to guide you through a lot of the Muscle Cars crew missions. He will have an active presence during missions and is often involved in jobs for the crew. As a part of the crew, a lot of your interactions during missions will be with Joey.;ew
MCM-003;Muscle Car Motors;Micky The Fist Stable;40;African American;Security;Muscle Car Motors;Micky Stable is the security for Donnie Solano. Not that Donnie really needs it, but in those special cases that muscle is needed, Micky is always there. Micky is a calm, collected person who doesn’t use many words to say what he wants. He speaks when spoken to and only when he has something relevant to say. But don’t take him for a fool. He may be big and strong, but he wasn’t born yesterday.;Micky will join you on missions that require that added level of security or when someone needs to be taught a lesson in manners. One of Micky is enough to get any job done and done right.;ew
MCM-004;Muscle Car Motors;Saline;35;American and Unknown;Henchman;Muscle Car Motors;Amanda and Saline are best friends and love the feeling of a powerful engine. They are both quick tongued, outspoken and ferocious in their words and actions. Not the kind of women to take lightly. Both know how to handle themselves in a fight, should that be necessary.;Any side missions, smaller jobs, quick jobs or random jobs may involve these ladies by your side. They will be there to help you and support you in completing your missions, but can’t boss you around. The story of Saline is still a mystery, you can decide to put them together or make a separate box for each. Either way, later on her story will become clear and she will require her own box for sure.;ew
MCM-005;Muscle Car Motors;Freddy Froth;34;American;Special Character;Muscle Car Motors;Freddy is…. Freddy. He’s just there. He pops up out of nowhere, isn’t particularly liked by anyone, but not hated either. Freddy is a little bit off, and it’s not sure if he knows it himself yet. His name alone brings up questions, and he’s no stranger to using his name in funny ways when he speaks. He often speaks in third person and in crazy sentences.;Freddy is there for the stranger things. Missions with Freddy will be weird and crazy;ew
MCM-006;Muscle Car Motors;Simon O’Sullivan;29;Irish American;Engineer;Muscle Car Motors;Simon is from an Irish family who doesn’t swallow his words and has a high IQ. Simon does all the engineering for the Muscle Car Crew and will always be there to place a smart comment or quirky remark. Simon knows his engines well, but that’s most definitely not all he knows well. Don’t underestimate Simon, there is more to him than meets the eye!;Any mission that involves the technical aspect of things, supply runs for the Muscle Crew Cars or any other complicated missions will involve Simon. He will give your these types of jobs to do for the crew.;ew
MCM-007;Muscle Car Motors;Saline;28;;;;;;
MDC-001;Mimiko's Drifting Crew;MIMIKO MATSUMOTO;30;Asian Japanese;Leader;Mimiko’s Drifting Crew;Mimiko is relentless. There is no stopping or bargaining with this lady. She likes order, respect, results. If you don’t improve, she WILL punish or shame you. She can be cruel at times, but once you get to know her more, you realize that it all has a reason and purpose. Mimiko won’t let her guard down, even for a second and not for anyone…. Except… Maybe for one person.;As the leader of the Mimiko Drifting Crew, Mimiko herself has to make sure everything goes right. Because failure is not an option. Therefore, the majority of the jobs will come from her. And you better do them the right way, because there is no wrong way!;ew
MDC-002;Mimiko's Drifting Crew;Ichiro Adachi;35;Asian Japanese;Luitenant;Mimiko’s Drifting Crew;Ichiro Adachi is the embodiment of loyalty. Nothing gets past him. As the right hand man of Mimiko, he is just as relentless, extremely respectful and he serves only one agenda: to make sure what Mimiko says gets done.;Ichiro is there to give orders, carry them out and make sure nothing goes wrong. He will join you on certain missions, but he will expect results and reports on other missions, so he can report back to Mimiko. And it better be good news, or he will make you do it again! Failure will not be tolerated!;ew
MDC-003;Mimiko's Drifting Crew;Ren & Riku Shima;28;Asian Japanese;Security;Mimiko’s Drifting Crew;Wait… Who is who? Ren and Riku are identical twins. Raised to be martial artists, both can handle themselves more than adequately in a fight. They are quiet, speak when spoken to, do as they’re told and stay out of sight as much as they can. Perhaps there is more about these two than initially assumed…;Ren & Riku speak as one and move as one. Therefore, in missions requiring their involvement, they move quickly and with purpose. Missions involving them are straight to the point and quickly accomplished. Because if they aren’t, they can’t be there to protect Mimiko. They will continuously defend you as an asset, but just because they have to, doesn’t mean they like to. After all, you aren’t Mimiko.;ew
MDC-004;Mimiko's Drifting Crew;Umi;24;Asian Japanese;Henchman;Mimiko’s Drifting Crew;Where everyone else is calm and collected, Umi is not. She’s loud, doesn’t care about anything but her own interests and as her name suggests, she is a beauty. But her behavior is definitely questionable. The only time she isn’t who she is, is in the presence of Mimiko. That’s basically the only time she holds her tongue.;Umi is there for the crazy missions. She may not give orders, but she will provide you with out of this world missions, that make being part of Mimiko’s Drifting Crew kinda fun after all. Leave it to Umi to spice things up with some unexpected missions.;ew
MDC-005;Mimiko's Drifting Crew;Gaijin;27;British;Specific Character;Mimiko’s Drifting Crew;Although Gaijin is not Asian, and his real name isn’t really Gaijin but Max Turnall, Gaijin has spent his whole life in Japan. He is as much a Drifter as anyone else in Mimiko’s Drifting Crew. And he may not look the part, but everything else about Gaijin is as real as it gets. Gaijin is focused, respectful and clear headed. He will never betray Mimiko and will only do that what is needed to further the agenda as it’s set.;Gaijin will be your guide through the ways and culture. Every mission brings a new lesson and a new door will open for you. Each step, closer to the circle of trust. So try to impress Gaijin, because if he says you’re ok, you’re ok.;ew
MDC-006;Mimiko's Drifting Crew;The Accountant;68;Asian Japanese;Special Character;Mimiko’s Drifting Crew;Known only as The Accountant, he is nervous, worried, stressed. The Accountant is always working the numbers. And if only the smallest thing is off, you better be there to help him fix it, before Mimiko realizes it!;Any mission involving The Accountant will be related to money, collecting money from someone who owes, fixing mistakes or making sure nothing will go wrong. The Accountant will often call for your help and ask you to prevent disaster or… worse.;ew
VIL-001;Villains;Darius Harvell;43;African American;The Brother;None;Don’t let that nice smile fool you. Darius Harvell is a real badass. And a really bad person. Everything his brother is not, Darius seems to have his own agenda and his own setup. Always coming off friendly, until you realize it’s all a façade. Darius has no problems telling you about some cold hard facts about Adrenaline City or his brother.;Meticulous, determined, cruel. Missions that involve Darius will paint a brighter picture of what’s what, but make you wonder if he’s going about it the right way. Was Darius always this way, or did something happen to him?;ew
VIL-002;Villains;The Mystery Biker;Unknown;Unknown;Mystery Biker;None;Relentless and pure evil. Whoever this is, they got issues. And they don’t really care who gets hurt in the process. A man of few words but very many actions, The Mystery Biker should be someone to be feared and watched out for.;The Mystery Biker seems to like chaos and mayhem. Although it’s unknown why at this point, missions involving him require your bike skills to get to the bottom of it all. There must be a reason why this guy is out for blood so badly.;ew
VIL-003;Villains;Maze;Unknown;Mexican;The Hacker;None;Cocky, confident, sly. Maze knows anything related to hard and software. He knows you need him, and his services don’t come cheap. If it weren’t for his much needed skills sometimes, you’d teach him a lesson. But you can’t do without him.;A different kind of villain, Maze can be both your worst enemy or an unexpected friend. It kind of depends on the situation. But it doesn’t make it any nicer to have to deal with him. He always seems to have a motive of his own and it’s usually money related.;ew
VIL-004;Villains;Mr. Penney;26;South African;The Corporate Guy;None;Mr. Penney is overly arrogant, over confident, overboard and over everything else. The only thing he isn’t over, is himself. As the main guy representing the Penney Corporation, he seems to always have a way of sticking his nose into things he really shouldn’t. But when you have as much money as he does, there’s very little you can do about him, except tolerate his arrogance.;It seems Mr. Penney has his finger in a lot of pies. Although you don’t really know why, or even when he gets involved, you can be sure that he’ll let you know when and why when he feels like it. Unfortunately you’ll need to do some missions for him to get what you want or need. And he’s all to happy to make you work for it.;ew
VIL-005;Villains;Mrs. Robitaille;40;British/French;The Good Samaritan;None;A loudmouth, overly excited, and a waaaay to friendly personality, Mrs. Robitaille seems like your average over the top lady. And she is, but she’s not average. A force to be reckoned with, Mrs. Robitaille may not race, but she sure can hustle! Sometimes, too good. And that can set you back a pretty penny.;Sometimes the only way to get what you need, is through Mrs. Robitaille. And she always, always makes you pay for it. Missions involving Mrs. Robitaille aren’t for your benefit, they are for hers. And more than sometimes that means breaking the law.;ew
VIL-006;Villains;Mr. Díaz;34;Columbian;The Spy;None;Spies are as mysterious as they get. You don’t know what they want, where they are coming from, who they know or what they can do. Mr. Díaz embodies all these qualities. But he’s also a little bit too rude sometimes. And that may be because he’s about as sinister as they get.;Mr. Díaz will quickly make you aware of the world outside of Adrenaline City. You may have to travel the world to assist him. And it’s usually done under threat of blackmail or some other nefarious piece of info he will hold over your head. And most of the times, you don’t even know what you really helped him with. But you’re sure to find out!;ew
SPC-001;Special Characters;Mr. Owens;40;Welsh;The Rich Psychopath;None;You looking for a certified looney? Check. You looking for someone with more money than they can spend? Check. You looking for someone who has an agenda of his own that no one can figure out? Check. Mr. Owens is definitely an odd ball. But where he may seem crazy at first, maniacal even, there might be more to him than meets the eye. Be on your toes around him!;Weird stuff? What do you mean weird stuff? Mr. Owens will tell you, frantically! But for every crazy mission he puts you on, his rewards are... Worth it? You decide.;ew
SPC-002;Special Characters;The Thief;Unknown;Unknown;Professional Thief;Unknown;Quick, annoying, taunting, highly frustrating. That’s about all you can say about him. Or her. Until you figure out who it is that keeps outsmarting you every time, this one will just get on your nerves.;Role? To annoy the hell out of you. Just when you think things are going your way, there he/she is again, ruining your success. But maybe not all is as black and white as you think. There must be more going on here than a simple thief...;ew
SPC-003;Special Characters;The Mystery Man;Unknown;Unknown;Unknown;Unknown;The Mystery Man appears out of nowhere, always saying half of what you need to know, but just enough to know you should listen. Never stays long enough for you to ask questions or to figure out who he is.;With all the mysteries, vague and unclear things going on in Adrenaline City, The Mystery Man seems to be a force for good, one way or another. Always there to help you out when you didn’t expect it, provide you with hints and information that might just make the difference between getting a better picture of what’s really going on or being oblivious to the facts. But who is he??? And why is he helping you?;ew
SPC-004;Special Characters;The Mystery Driver;Unknown;Unknown;Unknown;;There is very little known about The Mystery Driver. That’s why he’s called The Mystery Driver. Duh. What you do know however, is that he likes a challenge, he likes to race, he’s damned good at it too. And one thing you know for sure, he can get on your nerves like no other.;No mystery can stay a mystery for ever. Or can it? The missions you encounter with The Mystery Driver are always to test you, push your limits and always include some interesting rewards. So it can’t all be bad, right? Right? You best get to the bottom of this. Who is he and why does he always look you up?;ew
SPC-005;Special Characters;Kwayzee The Clown;Unknown;Unknown;Clown;None;If there ever was an evil, diabolical, sinister, crazy, at times even funny clown, Kwayzee would definitely be it. What’s this guy’s problem? He doesn’t seem to have any motive, any rhyme or reason, any purpose, other than insanity. How can you reason with someone like him?;Kwayzee will give you the craziest, the most unexpected, the weirdest and most illogical missions this City has to offer. But he’s neither with or against you. He just seems to be a part of Adrenaline City that nobody wants, but everyone has no choice but to accept. I mean, you can’t really arrest someone for being crazy. But it also seems he can’t be caught or tripped up in any way. Maybe this clown isn’t just crazy. Maybe he’s a lot more than you think. Or maybe he’s nothing you ever expected...;ew
SPC-006;Special Characters;The Representative;37;Australian;Representative;The Organization;This guy doesn’t play around. He can walk the walk AND talk the talk. And he backs it up too! A man not to be trifled with! Tough, strict, demanding, scary!;As a representative of The Organization, his role is to make you understand that there are forces at play in Adrenaline City that go far beyond some gang rivalries and that there is always a bigger fish in the pond. Everyone seems to know him and fear him. Missions that include The Representative aren’t a choice, they’re a must. And you better not fail or there will be consequences you won’t like. On the other hand, if you do well, you’ll be compensated appropriately also.;ew
